title: The Arcane Compiler
synopsis: A software engineer reincarnates into a world where magic is code. Armed with his knowledge of programming and a mysterious system that treats spells like functions, he sets out to debug the fundamental flaws of the world itself.
author: Kaminari Ryu

title: Silver Throne Chronicles
synopsis: The forgotten third prince discovers he alone can wield the legendary Silver Flame — a power feared by gods and kings alike. Now he must navigate court politics, ancient prophecies, and a war that could consume the entire continent.
author: Meihua Chen

title: Void Walker's Diary
synopsis: She wakes up in a new body every seven days with no memory of her past lives — only a leather-bound diary that updates itself. Each life holds a clue. Each death brings her closer to the truth.
author: Sable Noir

title: Demon King's Redemption
synopsis: Defeated after a thousand years of conquest, the Demon King is reincarnated as a human child in the very kingdom he once destroyed. Growing up among his former enemies, he must choose: return to his old ways or forge a new destiny.
author: Takeshi Mori
